title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.383 - Grain elevators and feed mills, certain elevators exempt from safety and inspection requirements
text:
701.383.  Grain elevators and feed mills, certain elevators exempt from safety and inspection requirements. — Single person elevator lifts and belt manlifts operating only in grain elevators or feed mills will be exempt from sections 701.350 to 701.380 unless inspection is requested by the owner.
(L. 2002 H.B. 1348)
